title: Irish Mashed Umami Hash
description: A hearty Irish-inspired dish combining the richness of mashed potatoes with the savory flavors of umami hash.
instructions: Boil the chopped potatoes in a large pot of salted water until tender, about 15-20 minutes.
Drain the potatoes and return them to the pot with butter, milk, salt, and pepper.
Mash the potatoes with a potato masher or a fork until they're smooth and creamy.
Meanwhile, heat the umami hash in a skillet over medium heat until crispy and golden brown.
Fluff the mashed potatoes with a fork and stir in the cooked umami hash.
Transfer the Irish Mashed Umami Hash to a serving dish and garnish with chopped parsley.
